title: Add cid+multihash deps; JSON-LD context endpoint stub
description:
What: Two trivial infrastructure changes.

1. In /home/mark/PROJECT/Agora/Cargo.toml [workspace.dependencies], add:
   cid = "0.11"
   multihash = "0.19"
   Then add cid.workspace = true and multihash.workspace = true to core/Cargo.toml.

2. In /home/mark/PROJECT/Agora/relay/src/main.rs, add a static JSON-LD context endpoint:
   Route: GET /ns/v1
   Response: Content-Type: application/ld+json
   Body: a JSON object with @context mapping GuildState/ChannelState types to the agora vocab URI
   Minimal context is fine:
   {"@context":{"agora":"https://agora.protocol/ns/v1","GuildState":"agora:GuildState","ChannelState":"agora:ChannelState","DataIntegrityProof":"agora:DataIntegrityProof"}}
   Use axum::response::Json or a static string handler.

Defensive: No user input involved. deps are version-pinned.

After changes run: cargo check --workspace 2>&1
Report: pass/fail. Show the two new dep lines in Cargo.toml.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check --workspace exits 0; cid and multihash appear in workspace Cargo.toml; GET /ns/v1 route exists in main.rs
